items.title: VI Live: Van de Ven scoort voor Spurs, City en Brighton op voorsprong
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er weer veel fraaie potjes in binnen- en buitenland op het programma. NEC krijgt bezoek van PEC Zwolle, FC Twente speelt tegen Excelsior en in het buitenland komen onder meer Liverpool, Manchester City, Bayern München en Real Madrid in actie. Volg het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: Zeldzame uitglijder Bayern op weg naar CL-ontmoeting met PSV
items.summary: Bayern München heeft zaterdagmiddag, op weg naar de Champions League-ontmoeting met PSV, een pijnlijke en zeldzame competitienederlaag geleden. FC Augsburg werd de eerste Bundesliga-ploeg sinds 8 maart 2025 die erin slaagde om Der Rekordmeister te verslaan.

items.title: VI Live: Volendam bijt vlak voor rust van zich af tegen Ajax
items.summary: Zaterdagmiddag om 16.30 uur neemt Ajax het in eigen huis op tegen FC Volendam. Bij een zege wippen de Amsterdammers (voor even) over concurrent Feyenoord heen. Of dat lukt, volg je in deze VI Live.

items.title: Root stars in rare England ODI win to set up series decider in Sri Lanka
items.summary: England put a halt to their torrid one-day international record as they claimed a five-wicket win over Sri Lanka to take their three-match ODI series to a decider in Colombo.

items.title: Burnley v Tottenham, Man City v Wolves, Championship and more: clockwatch – live
items.summary: Join us for updates from the 3pm kick-offs Share your thoughts with Rob via email Kevin and Alex Iwobi come into the Fulham XI. Brighton bring in Olivier Boscagli, Carlos Baleba and Yasin Ayari. It’s not clear who will start at right-back for them, possibly Pascal Gross. Fulham (4-2-3-1) Leno; Castagne, Andersen, Cuenca, Robinson; Iwobi, Berge; Wilson, Smith Rowe, Kevin; Jimenez. Continue reading...

items.title: Ajax Quiz: recordzeges in de Johan Cruijff Arena
items.summary: Ajax speelt zaterdag zijn vijfhonderdste wedstrijd in de Johan Cruijff Arena en via deze quiz staat VI stil bij deze mijlpaal. We zijn op zoek naar de 42 Ajax-spelers die in actie kwamen tijdens de recordwedstrijden te Amsterdam.

items.title: Transfers Ajax: Frankfurt wilde Steur naar Duitsland halen
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij Ajax op de voet, zeker nu de winterse transferwindow in aantocht is. De doelwitten van de Amsterdammers, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: Mead and Caldentey star as Arsenal triumph over Chelsea
items.summary: Beth Mead puts Arsenal in front in the 55th minute before Mariona Caldentey completes a 2-0 victory for the Gunners at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Spillane's Tower bounces back for Cotswold Chase triumph
items.summary: Spillane's Tower roared back to his very best to take victory in the Betfair Cotswold Chase on Trials day at Cheltenham.

items.title: Championship roundup: Boro hammer Preston while Millwall thrash Charlton
items.summary: Boro put pressure on Coventry with 4-0 win at Deepdale Millwall keep up playoff pace with 4-0 win over Addicks Middlesbrough moved to within three points of Championship leaders Coventry by heaping more misery on 10-man Preston at the Riverside. Alan Browne returned to haunt his former club by putting Boro ahead, while Tommy Conway and Morgan Whittaker exploited defensive lapses to put Boro three up at half-time. Jordan Storey was red-carded shortly after the resumption and Conway rounded off the scoring to give Middlesbrough a fourth league victory in a row. Continue reading...

items.title: Fernandes and Bowen boost West Ham survival push in win over Sunderland
items.summary: The unfamiliar sensation coursing through West Ham is hope. Seemingly down and out after their devastating defeat to Nottingham Forest earlier this month, the prospect of Nuno Espírito Santo masterminding the unlikeliest of escapes feels far from outlandish after seeing his side treat the London Stadium to the rare sensation of a performance full of craft, desire and tactical intelligence. Sunderland were blown away by three goals inside the first 43 minutes. They looked stunned by West Ham’s intensity and quality in attack. Jarrod Bowen was outstanding, Crysencio Summerville scored for the third time in as many games and the brilliance of Mateus Fernandes in midfield suggested that West Ham will be able to cope if they grant Lucas Paquetá his wish to join Flamengo. Continue reading...

items.title: Caldentey and Mead on target as Arsenal deliver blow to Chelsea’s WSL title hopes
items.summary: A strike from Beth Mead and a second from Mariona Caldentey earned Arsenal a cathartic 2-0 win over Chelsea and pulled them to within a point of their London rivals in the WSL table. A first victory for Arsenal at Stamford Bridge, and first away win against Chelsea in eight years, dented the holders’ title hopes in the process. The Blues now sit six points behind league leaders Manchester City, who travel to London City Lionesses on Sunday with the chance to extend that gap to nine. Continue reading...

items.title: 'The Gunners fire finally!' - Mead puts Arsenal ahead against Chelsea
items.summary: Beth Mead's 10th goal against Chelsea gives Arsenal the lead at Stamford Bridge in the Women's Super League.

items.title: Arsenal stun Chelsea as Blues' hopes of retaining WSL title suffer blow
items.summary: Chelsea's hopes of retaining the WSL title for a seventh straight year are hanging by a thread after a clinical second-half Arsenal showing saw them beaten 2-0 at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Carrick: Man United ready for Arsenal 'challenge'
items.summary: Michael Carrick is prepared for a "big challenge" at table-topping Arsenal but says there is a quiet confidence around Manchester United.

items.title: Berman: Rodman deal shows new rule is working
items.summary: NWSL commissioner Jessica Berman cited Trinity Rodman's new deal as evidence that the league's new High Impact Player is working as intended: to retain and attract top players.

items.title: Sources: Arsenal exploring Álvarez summer move
items.summary: Arsenal are exploring the possibility of launching a summer move for Atletico Madrid forward Julián Álvarez, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Infantino: Resale will drive up WC ticket prices
items.summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said that many fans who have applied for tickets for the 2026 World Cup will be looking to sell them for profit on resale sites, thus driving up the cost of ticket prices.

items.title: German official calls for World Cup boycott talks
items.summary: A German soccer federation executive committee member says it's time to consider a World Cup boycott because of the actions of U.S. President Donald Trump.

items.title: Reed extends Dubai lead as McIlroy's hopes fade
items.summary: Patrick Reed extended his lead to four shots ahead of the final round of the Hero Dubai Desert Classic as Viktor Hovland surged into contention on Saturday.
